Sun.description: Represents identity, ego, self-expression and vitality.
Sun.influence: Core sense of self and life purpose. Strong Sun placement brings confidence, leadership, and recognition.
Sun.challenges: Ego conflicts, arrogance, burnout from overexertion.

Moon.description: Represents emotions, inner world, intuition and nurturing energy.
Moon.influence: Governs emotional responses, subconscious mind, and maternal instincts. Affects mood and mental well-being.
Moon.opportunities: Emotional healing, deeper intuition, stronger family bonds.

Mars.description: Represents ambition, drive, assertiveness and conflict.
Mars.influence: Fuels energy, courage, and physical vitality. Drives competitiveness and determination.
Mars.opportunities: Physical strength, courage to take bold actions, competitive success.

Venus.description: Represents love, harmony, relationships and art.
Venus.influence: Governs romantic relationships, beauty, luxury, and artistic expression.
Venus.opportunities: Romantic fulfillment, artistic success, financial prosperity.

Mercury.description: Represents communication, logic, travel and intelligence.
Mercury.influence: Rules intellect, speech, analytical ability, and short-distance travel. Affects learning and commerce.
Mercury.opportunities: Intellectual growth, successful negotiations, writing and speaking skills.

Jupiter.description: Represents wisdom, growth, fortune and knowledge.
Jupiter.influence: The great benefic — brings expansion, abundance, spiritual wisdom, and higher learning.
Jupiter.opportunities: Wealth, spiritual growth, educational success, long-distance travel.

Saturn.description: Represents discipline, responsibility, boundaries and lessons.
Saturn.influence: The great teacher — enforces karma, discipline, and long-term rewards through hard work and perseverance.
Saturn.challenges: Delays, restrictions, loneliness, harsh life lessons.
Saturn.opportunities: Mastery through patience, career stability, lasting achievements.

Rahu.description: Represents obsession, illusion, unconventional paths and worldly desires.
Rahu.influence: Shadow planet that amplifies desires, creates obsession, and pushes toward unconventional success.
Rahu.opportunities: Innovation, breaking barriers, foreign connections, technology.

Ketu.description: Represents detachment, spirituality, past karma and liberation.
Ketu.influence: Shadow planet that drives spiritual evolution, past-life karma resolution, and detachment from material world.
Ketu.challenges: Isolation, lack of direction, emotional numbness.
Ketu.opportunities: Spiritual enlightenment, mystical experiences, deep wisdom.
